title: Alice's Adventures in Wonderland (Part 7)
titleZh: 爱丽丝梦游仙境（第7部分）

q.en: What does the Duchess believe about everything she and Alice discuss?
q.zh: 公爵夫人对她和爱丽丝讨论的每件事持什么看法？

options.en: That everything is a waste of time
That everything has a moral, if only you can find it
options.zh: 只要你能找到，每件事都有寓意

options.en: That only the Queen is right

explain.en: The Duchess says, 'Everything's got a moral, if only you can find it.'
explain.zh: 公爵夫人说：'只要你能找到，每件事都有寓意。'

q.en: According to the Gryphon, do the executions the Queen orders actually take place?
q.zh: 根据鹰头狮的说法，王后下令的处决真的会执行吗？

options.en: Yes, every one is carried out
No—'they never executes nobody'; it is all her fancy
options.zh: 不——'他们谁也不会被处决'，那只是她的幻想

explain.en: The Gryphon chuckles and says the executions are 'all her fancy'—nobody is really executed.
explain.zh: 鹰头狮笑着说那些处决'都只是她的幻想'——实际上谁也不会被处决。

q.en: What does the Mock Turtle say he once was, before telling his history?
q.zh: 在讲述身世之前，mock turtle 说自己曾经是什么？

explain.en: The Mock Turtle begins: 'Once... I was a real Turtle.'
explain.zh: 素甲鱼开口道：'从前……我是一只真正的海龟。'

q.en: Why did the sea-school master get the nickname 'Tortoise'?
q.zh: 海里的校长为什么得到'乌龟'(Tortoise)这个绰号？

options.en: Because he taught them—a play on 'taught us'
options.zh: 因为他'教'(taught)他们，是 taught us 的文字游戏

explain.en: 'We called him Tortoise because he taught us,' the Mock Turtle says angrily.
explain.zh: '我们叫他乌龟，因为他教(taught)我们，'素甲鱼生气地说。

q.en: According to the glossary, which word means 'a lesson to be learned from a story or experience'?
q.zh: 根据词汇表，哪个词的意思是'从故事或经历中可学到的教训'？

explain.en: The glossary defines moral as 'a lesson to be learned from a story or experience.'
explain.zh: 词汇表将 moral 定义为'从故事或经历中可学到的教训'。

q.en: Carroll turns ordinary school subjects into nonsense like 'Reeling and Writhing' and 'Uglification.' What technique is this?
q.zh: 卡罗尔把普通的学校科目变成了'摇摆与扭动'(Reeling and Writhing)、'丑化'(Uglification)之类的 nonsense。这用了什么手法？

options.en: Pun-filled wordplay that parodies school subjects
options.zh: 充满双关的文字游戏，戏仿学校科目

explain.en: Subjects like 'Reeling and Writhing' (for Reading and Writing) are puns that mock schooling.
explain.zh: 像'摇摆与扭动'(对应阅读与写作)这样的科目，是用双关语嘲弄学校教育。

q.en: The Gryphon reveals the Queen's death sentences are empty threats. What does this show the reader about Wonderland's dangers?
q.zh: 鹰头狮说王后的死刑判决只是空威胁。这向读者说明了仙境的威胁本质是什么？

options.en: The dangers are real and fatal
The terror is mostly illusion; threats are not carried out
options.zh: 恐惧大多是幻象，威胁并不会真正执行

options.en: Alice is in great physical danger
options.zh: 爱丽丝面临极大的生命危险

options.en: The King is the cruel one

explain.en: Since nobody is actually executed, the fear is mostly pretend—Wonderland's menace is theatrical.
explain.zh: 既然没有人真的被处决，恐惧多半是假装的——仙境的威胁只是做戏。

q.en: The Duchess finds a 'moral' in everything she says, which confuses Alice. How does this affect Alice's experience?
q.zh: 公爵夫人对自己说的每句话都要找出'寓意'，这让爱丽丝感到困惑。这对爱丽丝的体验有何影响？

options.zh: 这让爱丽丝觉得自己很有智慧

options.en: It annoys and puzzles her, showing adults' silly habit of moralizing
options.zh: 这让她又恼又惑，展现出大人说教的可笑习惯

options.en: It helps her win the game

explain.en: Alice thinks 'How fond she is of finding morals in things!'—the habit puzzles and tires her.
explain.zh: 爱丽丝心想'她多爱从每件事里找寓意啊！'——这种习惯让她困惑又厌烦。

q.en: Why does the author include a Mock Turtle who attended a ridiculous sea-school with subjects like 'Uglification'?
q.zh: 作者为什么要安排一只上过荒唐海底学校、学习'丑化'等科目的素甲鱼？

options.en: To parody school and education with nonsense humor
options.zh: 用无厘头的幽默戏仿学校与教育

explain.en: The silly curriculum mocks strict Victorian schooling through Carroll's nonsense.
explain.zh: 这套荒唐的课程用卡罗尔的 nonsense 嘲笑了刻板的维多利亚式教育。

q.en: What is the author's main purpose in Part 7?
q.zh: 作者撰写第7部分的主要目的是什么？

options.en: To entertain through absurd wordplay, mock morals, and a parody of school
options.zh: 用荒唐的文字游戏、虚假的寓意说教以及对学校的戏仿来娱乐读者

options.en: To write a history of the sea
To explain how to play croquet

explain.en: Part 7 amuses readers with silly wordplay and a gentle parody of lessons and morals.
explain.zh: 第7部分用滑稽的文字游戏和对课堂与说教的轻松戏仿来取悦读者。

prompt.en: The characters in Wonderland make Alice feel puzzled and a little annoyed. Write an essay describing how these characters affect Alice and what this shows about her own character.
prompt.zh: 仙境中的角色让爱丽丝感到困惑又有点恼火。写一篇短文，描述这些角色如何影响爱丽丝，以及这反映出她自己怎样的性格。

en: Name one character (Duchess, Gryphon, or Mock Turtle).
Describe how that character treats Alice.
Explain what this reveals about Alice's patience or cleverness.
zh: 说出其中一个角色（公爵夫人、鹰头狮或素甲鱼）。
描述该角色如何对待爱丽丝。
说明这反映出爱丽丝的耐心或机智能。
